title: ARC THRIFT STORES - 211info
text: ARC OF BENTON COUNTY ARC THRIFT STORES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides used items such as furniture, housewares, clothing, and medical equipment. Accepts donations of similar items. 928 NW Beca Avenue Corvallis, OR 97330 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Saturday 10am-6pm, Sunday noon-5pm Email (541) 754-9011 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Other (541) 754-9011 Thrift store Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in. Call to arrange donation pick-up. FEES: Varies by item DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Benton County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 10am-4pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: West off 9th Street onto Beca Avenue. Store on corner of 10th Street and Beca Avenue. Route 2 of City Transit System stops on 9th Street near Beca Avenue. Services: Donation Drop Off Points Donation Pickups Thrift Shops Other Services Offered At This Location: CONSUMER REGULATION - COMMCARD PROGRAM SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - ADVOCACY AND DAY SUPPORTS ACTIVITIES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ARC OF BENTON COUNTY
